title: Matrices and Determinants
description: Learn matrices, types of matrices, and how to evaluate determinants.

title: Real and Complex Numbers
description: Understand real numbers, irrational numbers, and introduction to complex numbers.

title: Logarithms
description: Apply logarithmic laws to simplify and solve expressions.

title: Algebraic Expressions and Formulas
description: Use algebraic identities and formulas for simplification and expansion.

title: Factorization
description: Factorize algebraic expressions using different techniques.

title: Linear Equations and Inequalities
description: Solve equations and inequalities and understand their solutions.
